[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Enjoy a Perfect Paradise with Shimla Honeymoon Packages”][vc_column_text]

Shimla, Himachal Pradesh’s charming hill station, is blessed with the natural beauty of forests and waterfalls. From strolling through the streets and enjoying a hot beverage in a fancy café to witnessing the sunrise while cozying with your beloved – there’s so much to see and do in Shimla. You can go souvenir shopping, buy the best winter wear at cheap prices, or pick exquisite, handcrafted wooden items. If nothing interests you, pick your favorite viewpoint to go bird watching. And if you’re looking to make your vacation memorable, visit us! At ATW Travels, we offer Shimla honeymoon packages at the most affordable prices.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why is Shimla the Best Place for a Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

With the best Shimla honeymoon packages from ATW Travels, you can explore stunning tourist destinations while spending quality time together with your better half. Himachal Pradesh’s capital city is surrounded by lush vegetation, unique flora, snow-capped mountains, and breathtaking scenery. The lovely weather and stunning location wonderfully complement your honeymoon mood. We provide a range of services catering to your specific needs, from renting nice and fuzzy honeymoon suits to providing comfortable transportation. With our best Shimla honeymoon tour packages, you can visit great restaurants, enjoy amazing local cuisine, and shop at unique spots.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19378″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips to Plan a Stress-free Honeymoon in Shimla” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

  • Take woolen clothing even if you’re planning a summer vacation as it could be windy.
  • Depart early in the morning to avoid traffic.
  • Take a first-aid kit, insect repellent, moisturizer, and appropriate hiking clothing for a camping trip.
  • Dress appropriately for skiing or horseback riding.
  • Don’t hesitate to bargain at some of Shimla’s famous shopping areas like The Mall, Tibetan Bazaar, and Lakkar Bazaar.
  • Keep your vaccine certificate and some ID proof handy, and most venues require guests to show their COVID vaccination certification before entry.
  • Keep some cash in hand to avoid depending on ATMs or credit cards.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218684571{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Cost of the Shimla Honeymoon Package?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Typical Shimla honeymoon package prices depend on the number of people traveling, accommodation arrangements, and the number of days you wish to spend in Shimla. At ATW Travels, typical Shimla honeymoon packages range from INR 9,299 to INR 43,999.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Shimla is Best for a Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

If the beautiful capital of Himachal Pradesh has sparked your interest, here’s everything you need to know about before choosing a romantic Shimla honeymoon tour package. Some of the best tourist attractions include:

  • Naldehra Peak
  • Kufri
  • Chail
  • The Scandal Point

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19380″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Best Time to Visit Shimla for a Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Shimla is pleasant all through the year, offering a variety of experiences depending on the season. Ideally, the months from October to March are suitable for couples planning to experience snow for the first time. But if you’re looking for a picture-perfect landscape or interested in camping, paragliding, or trekking, consider visiting Shimla from March to June. But if you’re looking for low-budget Shimla honeymoon packages, consider visiting the place from July to September.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why ATW Travels is the Best Travel Agency for Shimla Honeymoon Packages?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels has been offering budget vacation packages for over four decades. We’ve made it our mission to encourage everyone to explore new places and meet new people irrespective of their budget. We’ve curated some of the most exciting vacation packages with innovative travel ideas at a fair cost. We provide a wide range of Shimla honeymoon packages for couples and guarantee the utmost transparency and cost-effective solutions.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Places to Visit in Shimla for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Shimla is home to some wonderfully romantic spots that stand up to the buzz around them. A visit to these destinations is sure to make your honeymoon a memorable experience. Here’s a list of things you must do at some of Shimla’s famous places.

  • Get a panoramic view of the snow-capped mountains from Naldehra Peak.
  • Take a train ride on the Kalka-Shimla on the Shivalik Deluxe Express
  • Visit the lush green forests of the Green Valley that are lined with thousands of pine and deodar trees.
  • Visit Scandal Point to experience nightlife in Shimla
  • Seek the blessings of Lord Hanuman at Jakhoo Hills
  • Visit Summer Hill for its fervent charm and serene ambiance.
  • Immerse yourselves in the culture and heritage of Shimla with a visit to the Gaiety Theatre.
  • Take a stroll around the Mall with your beloved while enjoying the snow around you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19381″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Shimla for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Shimla’s little cottages are just as charming as some of its opulent resorts. From sampling some of the best wines in a candlelight ambiance to savoring breathtaking views from an infinity pool, we can make all your honeymoon fantasies come true. We’ve ensured you have accommodations at the best hotels and resorts with comfortable rooms and plenty of amenities. The following are the top-rated hotels in Shimla with the best honeymoon suites:

  • Hall of Wildflower
  • Springfields Hotel
  • Shimla Holiday Inn
  • Shimla Havens Resort
  • Clarke’s Hotel

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

FAQs About Shimla Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time for A Honeymoon in Shimla?
Shimla is pleasant and worth visiting at any time of the year, with each season offering a unique experience. However, October to March is best for couples looking to experience the tranquility of nature and a relaxing time with their love amidst the snow.
Which Is the Best Month to Visit Shimla?
Shimla can be visited between March and June as these months have pleasant weather with temperatures fluctuating between 15°C and 30°C during this time. Snowfall in Shimla is best experienced during the winter months.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Shimla Trip?
When planning a honeymoon trip to Shimla, you need to clear your schedule for at least 7 to 8 days.
Is Shimla Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Shimla is completely safe for everyone, including couples. However, you must follow instructions directed by your local guide to ensure safety and security. We partner with hotels that strictly follow COVID protocols and sanitization requirements.
How Can I Reach Shimla?
Chandigarh is the nearest city to Shimla and is well connected by road. Although there are no direct trains from Chandigarh to Shimla, you can take the Kalka-Shimla Express. Kalka is only 27 km away from Chandigarh and is connected by train and bus. You could also travel from Delhi, 350 kilometers away from Shimla. Again, there are no direct trains or buses, but several connecting trains operate daily. You could also hire a private taxi from Delhi or book a Volvo bus through travel operators.
How Can I Travel to Shimla?
When visiting Shimla, you have the option of hiring a cab or taking the bus. You may go trekking with your partner to all the destinations in Shimla if you enjoy the adventure.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Shimla?
You need a three-month tourist visa to travel to Shimla.
